mapper.select: SELECT * FROM content WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM content WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM content WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM content WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content (title, content, category, tags, status, author_id, author_name, view_count, like_count, create_time, update_time, deleted, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0, 'system', 'system')
mapper.update: UPDATE content SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
